title: Self-host + Cloudflare decommission executed (FW2): orcast-api.aimez.ai retired
statement: The dormant orcast self-host co-tenant is decommissioned. orcast-api.service on i-04a649f91274e9fce was stopped + disabled via SSM, and the orcast-api.aimez.ai Cloudflare ingress rule + api.orcast CNAME were removed. The shared aimez-services tunnel and the pax cv/shade co-tenants are preserved verbatim. App Runner (orcast-aws-backend) is now the sole production backend.

adversarial_gates.A1_pre_traffic_dependency: PASS — with the self-host stopped (orcast-api.aimez.ai 502), the console (/api/be/* 200), streaming, H0, and pax cv/shade (200) all stayed green; zero prod dependency on the tunnel
adversarial_gates.A2_post_teardown_health: PASS — orcast-api.aimez.ai 404 (route gone), pax cv/shade 200, console + explore (aurora_connected=true) + narrate/stream healthy on App Runner, H0 ALL PASS

rollback_posture_change.before: self-host was a one-env-var dormant rollback (set ORCAST_API_BASE to orcast-api.aimez.ai)
rollback_posture_change.after: NO self-host rollback exists. App Runner is the sole backend. Reverting to a self-host now requires re-provisioning (infra/shared_host/provision_orcast.sh + re-adding the Cloudflare ingress/CNAME) AND repairing the DD-6 RDS path.
rollback_posture_change.residual_risk: App Runner instance-recycle/cold-start window observed in FW-ACCEPT (~1 min, /api/explore/* 404/503 while /health 200); no warm fallback. Consider min-instances or a health alarm.

non_claims: The shared EC2 host (i-04a649f91274e9fce) is NOT terminated; it continues to run the pax cv/shade co-tenants. Only orcast's service + tunnel route were removed.
The orcast checkout at /opt/orcast and the host IAM policy were left in place (inert); full host cleanup is a separate optional operator task.
